description_long: This is a standard traffic cone with a conical shape and a wide, square base for stability. The cone features alternating horizontal bands of orange and white, with the orange sections being more prominent and the white bands providing high visibility. The surface appears to be made of flexible plastic or rubber, designed to withstand impacts and outdoor conditions. The tip of the cone is rounded and solid, with no attachments or openings. The base is thick and slightly beveled, likely weighted or reinforced to prevent tipping. There are no visible logos, text, or additional markings, and the cone appears to be in new or excellent condition.
description: A bright orange and white traffic cone with a wide, stable base and alternating colored bands, made of flexible plastic or rubber.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full conical shape, alternating orange and white bands, and the wide square base.
description_view_1: Side view with similar banding and base, highlighting the smooth, continuous surface and the cone's symmetry.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, with clear visibility of the color bands and base structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the alternating bands and the robust, stable base.
attribute_reflective_stripes: Two wide white horizontal stripes encircle the cone, one near the top and one at mid-height, both highly visible against the orange background.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is rounded, solid, and orange, with no attachments or openings.
attribute_base_design: The base is a thick, square platform, slightly beveled at the edges, made of sturdy material for stability and impact resistance.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos, text, or other markings are visible.
attribute_condition: The object appears new, clean, and free of visible wear or damage.
